task_completion.description: The presidential inauguration ages are entered into GeoGebra.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoGebra Spreadsheet view is visible and populated with the provided numerical data (e.g., 57, 61, 57, etc.).

task_completion.description: A histogram representing the data is generated in GeoGebra.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A histogram is visible in the GeoGebra Graphics view or One Variable Analysis window, with the x-axis spanning approximately from the low 40s to 80.

task_completion.description: A box-and-whisker plot representing the data is generated in GeoGebra.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A box-and-whisker plot is visible in the GeoGebra Graphics view or One Variable Analysis window. The left whisker should end at 42, the right whisker at 78, and the median line inside the box at 55.

task_completion.description: A text annotation showing the calculated median age is included in the view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box or label is visible in the GeoGebra Graphics view explicitly stating the median age (e.g., 'Median: 55' or similar text).

task_completion.description: The project is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GeoGebra window title bar displays 'presidential_ages_stats.ggb' or a save dialog is visible showing this exact filename being saved to the ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoGebra GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual GeoGebra application interface (menus, toolbars, spreadsheet, graphics view) being interacted with, rather than a terminal window running a script.

integrity.description: The plots genuinely reflect the provided data rather than being imported static images.
integrity.visual_evidence: The boxplot and histogram align correctly with the GeoGebra axes. The boxplot must specifically show the minimum at 42, maximum at 78, and median at 55.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to spoof the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using terminal commands like 'touch presidential_ages_stats.ggb' or python scripts to bypass using the GeoGebra application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly 46 values. The minimum age is 42, the maximum age is 78, and the median age is 55. The expected filename is 'presidential_ages_stats.ggb'. When verifying the boxplot, ensure the left whisker is at 42, the right whisker is at 78, and the vertical line inside the box (median) is exactly at 55. The text annotation must state the median is 55.
